title: Add Tickflow supervisor dashboard TUI
description: Build a Pi-native Tickflow supervisor dashboard that shows live wave progress, active agents, run records, leases, verifier results, merge conflicts, and awaiting-human tasks. Start with a lightweight persistent status widget, then add an interactive /tickflow-dashboard overlay.
acceptance_criteria: During Tickflow runs, the user can see current run id, epic, wave, active/completed/failed/awaiting ticks, latest verifier/merge decisions, and human-action items. A dashboard command can inspect persisted run state after interruption.
closed_reason: Completed Tickflow dashboard TUI epic including run-state model, live widget, dashboard overlay, awaiting-human surfacing, documentation, and detailed lifecycle status messages.
